tweets.topic: Samsung Brings iPhone-Style Upgrade Plan To India: Get The Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra At Half Its Price
tweets.tweet: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra now available at 50% off through their new upgrade plan in India, making the flagship accessible at ₹54,999. Finally Samsung copied Apple's smartest move — affordable flagships that actually make people upgrade instead of holding onto their old phones.

tweets.topic: India challenges Jio, Airtel over dropping entry-level plans
tweets.tweet: India's telecom regulator challenges Jio and Airtel for discontinuing entry-level plans below ₹300. Looks like budget consumers are finally getting someone to fight for them — but will it actually change anything? #Telecom #IndianTech

tweets.topic: Airtel vs Jio: How India’s telecom market became a duopoly
tweets.tweet: Airtel and Jio now dominate India's telecom market with over 70% combined subscriber base, effectively creating a two-player monopoly. Consumers enjoyed cheaper data rates during competition, but now face limited choices and potential price hikes ahead.

tweets.topic: Xiaomi, Oppo, Realme, OnePlus see first India revenue drop as premium shift aids Apple, Samsung: Report
tweets.tweet: Xiaomi, Oppo, Realme, and OnePlus posted their first revenue decline in India as customers shift toward Apple and Samsung premium devices. Budget phone makers finally learned that offering 108 megapixels doesn't beat brand loyalty — ouch. #IndianTech #Smartphones

tweets.topic: India’s Telecom Subscribers Reach 1.31 Billion; Jio, Airtel Dominate
tweets.tweet: India's telecom subscriber base hit 1.31 billion with Jio and Airtel leading the charge. Basically everyone's connected now, but good luck getting a customer service rep to answer your call. #IndianTelecom #JioAirtel

tweets.topic: Seven out of 10 consumers in India encountered tech support scams in the past year: Microsoft survey
tweets.tweet: Microsoft's survey reveals 7 out of 10 Indian consumers fell victim to tech support scams in the past year. Your grandma isn't the only one clicking that "Your PC has a virus" popup — apparently most of us are equally gullible. #CyberSecurity #IndianTech

tweets.topic: Xiaomi 17 Series Launch in India: Check Price, Sale Date, Early Bird Offers, Specifications, Features & More
tweets.tweet: Xiaomi 17 Series launched in India with early bird discounts starting at ₹24,999 for the base model. Finally a flagship that won't empty your bank account, but the sale rush might empty the stock in hours. #Xiaomi #IndianTech

tweets.topic: 7 in 10 consumers in India encountered tech support scams last year, highest globally: Microsoft
tweets.tweet: Microsoft reveals 7 out of 10 Indian consumers fell victim to tech support scams last year, the highest globally. Seems like our passwords are less secure than our trust in random WhatsApp messages promising free software updates. #CyberSecurity #IndianTech

tweets.topic: Delhi Delivery Agent Defrauds Amazon, Flipkart, Used To Return Old Items
tweets.tweet: Delhi delivery agent arrested for returning old items to Amazon and Flipkart, defrauding both platforms of lakhs in refunds. So your "new" phone might actually be someone's recycled reject — trust no one in the supply chain anymore. #EcommerceScam #IndianTech

tweets.topic: Govt plans new smartphone export incentives in a boost for Apple, Samsung
tweets.tweet: Government announced fresh smartphone export incentives targeting Apple and Samsung manufacturing in India. Looks like we're finally becoming the world's phone factory — hope our engineers get paid like Silicon Valley too. #MakeinIndia #TechExports
